summary: Completed frontend testing of theme system (light/dark mode) with toggle, persistence, animations, and styling. All 10 features verified working correctly.

issues: Some sections use hardcoded 'bg-white' and 'bg-slate-50' classes instead of CSS variables (lines 300-347, 349-425). While CSS overrides handle them, direct use of var(--surface) would be more consistent.
Table uses hardcoded 'bg-white' class but CSS overrides are handling it correctly. Minor improvement would be using CSS variables directly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system fully tested and working. CSS variables properly defined in App.css. ThemeContext.js handles state and localStorage. Layout.js contains toggle button.

theme_toggle_sidebar.notes: Toggle button in sidebar shows 'Mode Sombre' / 'Mode Clair' with Moon/Sun icons

theme_dark_colors.notes: Dark: bg #0F172A, cards #1E293B, text light (verified via CSS variables)

theme_light_colors.notes: Light: bg #F8FAFC, cards #FFFFFF, text dark (verified via CSS variables)

theme_persistence_localStorage.notes: Theme persists in localStorage under 'aps-theme' key. Verified by page reload test.

animations_fade_in_up.notes: 21 elements with animate-fade-in-up class. CSS keyframe animations defined.

hover_effects_hover_lift.notes: KPI cards and quick actions have hover-lift class. translateY(-2px) confirmed on hover.

kpi_cards_gradient_icons.notes: 4 KPI cards with gradient backgrounds (blue, orange, red, cyan) on icon containers

sidebar_active_indicator.notes: Active nav link has orange left border (3px solid #F97316) and background change

scheduling_page_theming.notes: Page displays correctly in both themes. Priority mode cards and solver settings visible.

rules_page_theming.notes: Table displays correctly with themed header and rows. CSS overrides handle styling.

accent_colors_verified.orange: #F97316 - Used in logo and active nav indicator
accent_colors_verified.blue: #0284C7 - Used in interactive elements and links

test_methodology: Playwright browser automation with localStorage checks, CSS variable inspection, and visual verification via screenshots
